---
title: Publications
---

## 2024

#### JoulesEye: Energy Expenditure Estimation and Respiration Sensing from Thermal Imagery While Exercising

Rishiraj Adhikary, Maite Sadeh, Nipun Batra, Mayank Goel. In ACM Interactive, Mobile, Wearable and Ubiquitous Technologies (IMWUT) 2024; and ACM Ubicomp 2024 [[PDF](../papers/2024/IMWUT_JoulesEye.pdf)]
